name: Observability Platform Marketing
description: Public marketing landing page for the observability platform. Showcases product vision, feature highlights, pricing tiers, testimonials, and call-to-action sections.

page_briefs.home: Full-bleed marketing landing page. Opens with a vision hero section featuring a bold headline, animated product screenshot, and primary CTA button. Scrolls into a feature grid highlighting metrics, logs, traces, and alerting capabilities with icons and short descriptions. Pricing section presents three tiers in side-by-side cards. Testimonials carousel shows quotes from engineering leaders. Closes with a full-width CTA section driving sign-up and demo booking.
